## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Verification

- [ ] Backend tests/lint pass where relevant.
- [ ] Frontend tests/build/typecheck pass where relevant.
- [ ] `python3 scripts/secret-scan.py` passes.
- [ ] `git diff --check` passes.
- [ ] Docs/runbooks updated if operator behavior changed.

## Safety and Operations

- [ ] No secrets, tokens, private URLs, or customer data are included.
- [ ] New dependencies/tools comply with the FOSS-first resource policy.
- [ ] High-impact or external side effects remain approval-gated.
- [ ] Readiness/audit/memory implications are documented.
- [ ] Migrations, backup/restore, or rollback impact is described if applicable.
